entity.summary: Chia ecosystem decentralized exchange and offer marketplace providing wallet-connected peer-to-peer asset offers and exchange discovery through a dedicated web application.
entity.notes: Current first-party dexie application endpoint remains reachable as a JavaScript application and identifies the service as Chia Offers / Chia DEX. CoinGecko independently preserves dexie as an exchange venue under the dexie.space domain. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: dexie Chia Offers application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party dexie application endpoint remains reachable and serves the Chia Offers / Chia DEX application shell.

evidence.title: dexie exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies dexie under the dexie.space domain and corroborates the exchange identity.

evidence.title: dexie exchange registry detail
evidence.notes: Entity-specific exchange registry detail supplements the first-party application evidence for conservative active classification.
